title: Item Wheel
description: Make dispensers more exciting by allowing you to make them spin a wheel to decide which item to dispense.
body:
Makes dispensers spin a wheel instead of dispensing immediately.

Forge & Fabric, Requires Architectury API.

Does not need to be installed on client when added to server.

 
**To make a dispenser/dropper do a wheel, place a compass into its middle slot.**


Example Video:
https://youtu.be/DCNFDgkSzg8
